items.title: Jamal Murray makes his first All-NBA team. Scottie Barnes snubbed. Jalen Johnson didn’t have an overall better year than him imo. Luka and Cade becoming eligible hurt Barnes, Jaylen Brown (second team instead of first) and KAT, amongst others.
items.author: Wolstat
items.body_excerpt:
Jamal Murray makes his first All-NBA team. Scottie Barnes snubbed. Jalen Johnson didn’t have an overall better year than him imo. Luka and Cade becoming eligible hurt Barnes, Jaylen Brown (second team instead of first) and KAT, amongst others. 
No LeBron for first time in decades
